text:
……貴方と一緒の探索、何度目かしら？
そろそろ貴方がリードしてもいいのよ？

……もし貴方がリードしたときは
パートナーにどんな動きを求めたか
しっかり覚えておいて。

……次に貴方が誰かを補佐するとき
その経験が生きてくるはず。

……そんなことも少し意識しながら
探索を進めて

We have been out on a fair number of
expeditions together, haven't we? Do you feel
ready to take the lead, yet?

As you take charge, keep in mind all the things
you wish your ally would do.

That way, the next time you are out here again
assisting someone, you will have a good idea
what they might expect from you.

At any rate, let's try and focus on these
points as we continue exploring today.
